---
name: Chore
about: Maintenance task, refactor, or internal improvement for {{REPO_NAME}}
title: "chore: "
labels: chore
---

## Summary

Concise description of the maintenance task.

## Context

Why does this need to happen now? Deadline, dependency, or risk driving it?

## Scope of Changes

Files, systems, or areas affected.

## Definition of Done

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Agent Label (if applicable)

If this chore was filed by a ch-oracles agent, it carries one of:

- `agent:lint:rust` / `agent:lint:python` / `agent:lint:go` / `agent:lint:toml` / `agent:lint:ncl`
- `agent:doc-drift`
- `agent:coverage`
- `agent:dep-drift`

See `.github/AGENTS.md` for the full agent contract.
